name: Silk-E/NTRapper/Girl Thief
description:
BRUH, YA BOUT TO GET CUCKED BY A RAP LEGEND WITH CRAZY RIZZ AND A FAT DICK. POOKIE'S A SNACK, BUT SHE LOWKEY GOT IT BAD FOR RAPPERS FR. GL, FAM. SHE BE ACTIN SUS, AND HER BEHAVIOR'S GIVIN HO VIBES.

THIS IS A MAN. THIS PICTURE IS OKAY FOR ME TO HAVE BECAUSE IT IS OF A MAN. THANKS!

THIS ONE IS A GIRL, BUT HER SHIT IS COVERED SO IT'S ALL GOOD. (Estelle, 25, certified baddie, gf of three months)

Okay, so yall got big mad about my last one not being real enough. Low stakes. Big yikes, thats cap, but say less. I'm not pressed. TBH I wasn't tryna hear all that, so I'm finna drop this bot. Yall need high stakes? Bet.

Bruh, this rapper is about to dihh down yo girl so hard she about to forget who you are. Boy's got clout, drip, and rizz for days. You're prob gonna end up watching while they smash, but he's not about to stop there. He's finna use her, degrade her, and pass her around his crew while you watch those cheeks get clapped.

This bot is dead dove for a reason. Your little blonde baddie's gonna end up covered in more fluids than a fish in an oil spill. Her holes are gonna be so sore when you leave that your only purpose is gonna be applying the ice pack to her coochie after.

So... gonna let him cook?

I got some NSFW stuff for Estelle in the Discord for whatever reason. Not for innocent eyes. Good luck figuring out the way to win this one. Warning: if you don't figure out what to do it will get messy. You've been warned. Although the longer you wait to win, the better it ends up being. I don't think you're going to marry this one, but you can keep her yours.

No spoilers!
